---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What problem are you trying to solve? Who benefits? Lead with the use case before the proposed solution.

## Proposed change

A clear description of what you want added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you did not pick them.

## Impact on reproducibility

LORE is a reproducible benchmark. Note here whether your change affects sample generation, scoring, or any frozen config, and how a previously-published result would be affected.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples.
